bead.title: agent: introduce private runInternal + AgentRunner signature with RunArgs adapter
bead.description:
Stage 2 prereq for B22 retirement (per worker analysis on 2026-04-26).

Adds a private runInternal(opts) inside cli/internal/agent/runner.go so internal callers (grade.go, service_run.go, runner.go itself, execute_bead_review.go) can keep dispatching without ResolvedConfig fakery. Defines a new RunArgs adapter type that production callers will migrate to in subsequent beads.

In-scope:
- cli/internal/agent/runner.go (add runInternal + RunArgs)
- cli/internal/agent/types.go (add RunArgs type definition)
- Tests for runInternal behavior

Out-of-scope:
- Migrating any external caller (B22b/c/d cover this)
- Deleting RunOptions/CompareOptions/QuorumOptions (B22 final)
- Changes to Runner.Run public signature (preserve until B22)
bead.acceptance: field RunArgs declared. (RunArgs is a new struct; gate verifies presence via field_declared regex sibling.) cd cli && go build ./... passes. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... passes including new TestRunInternal cases.
